title: Break Block Break Bones
description: This is a little mod I created for AustonBluBoy, if you break a block you lose 1 HP permanently (until you die). It can be used for challenges
body:
This is a little mod I created for AustonBluBoy, if you break a block you lose 1 HP permanently (until you die).

The only feature of this mod, is if a player breaks a block, then they will lose 1 HP forever. If they break 20 blocks then they will die from it; dying resets their health.
Because I'm not really familiar with the Fabric API (Not Fabric API, I mean the API of Fabric), my code isn't perfect, so sometimes visually the player's health won't appear to have changed; taking damage fixes the visual issue.

Breaking a Block = Breaking your Bones

This mod can be used in creative and interesting ways for different Minecraft challenges.
